title: Shell
text: Shell Sets the default window properties of the application shell. Shell = ushell ( Properties ) Arguments Properties —semi-colon delimited list of property-value pairs Table 1. Application Shell Properties Physical Property Name Property Description BackColor Background Color (BackColor) Background color of the window. BackImage Background Image (BackImage) Background image of the window. HAlign Horizontal Alignment (Halign) Horizontal alignment of the background image. VAlign Vertical Alignment ( Valign) Horizontal scaling of the background image Hscale Horizontal Scaling ( Hscale) Vertical alignment of background image. VScale Vertical Scaling ( Vscale) Vertical scaling of background image. PreserveAspect Preserve Aspect Ratio ( PreserveAspect) Specify whether to preserve the aspect ratio of the background image at all times. MessageLine Message Line Show or hide the message line at the bottom of the application window. state [state] The application shell window state. NORMAL (default) MAXIMIZED MINIMIZED XPosPerc The horizontal application shell window position, as a percentage relative to the relative to the primary Windows desktop. YPosPerc The vertical window position, as a percentage relative to the relative to the primary Windows desktop. XSizePerc The horizontal window size, as a percentage as a percentage relative to the relative to the primary Windows desktop. YSizePerc The vertical window size, as a percentage relative to the relative to the primary Windows desktop. Layouthistory TRUE ( default) | FALSE Save or load the size and position of the application shell to or from the Windows Registry. Positions from the history are ignored when the position is defined in the property string. Default value: None File section: [application] Description Default properties defined here can be overridden by application shell definitions and the $applproperties ProcScript function. For more information, see $applproperties . Example: Setting Shell Properties Setting the background color and image, and the alignment and scaling properties of the background image: [application] shell = ushell (backimage=@largeLogo.jpg;valign=top;halign=left;hscale=80;vscale=80; backcolor=ivory) Copy Related Links $applproperties Set the presentation properties of the application shell.
